message:
test(membrane): add SOS barrier architecture independence tests (bd-10pq)

Adds verification tests for SOS barrier certificates to ensure they
produce bit-identical results across x86_64, aarch64, and RISC-V:

- Golden value tests for fragmentation, thread safety, and size class barriers
- Overflow saturation consistency tests
- Monotonicity preservation tests
- Documentation of architecture-independence guarantees

These tests validate that SOS barrier evaluation uses only platform-
independent integer arithmetic with explicit little-endian encoding,
as required by bd-10pq acceptance criteria.

br-10pq

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
